LucyAndCalart.PF_CutthroatTrout.descript: A freshwater trout known for the bright red marking on its throat.
LucyAndCalart.PF_KoiCarp.description: A brightly colored carp that has been bred for its unique patterns.
LucyAndCalart.PF_Musky.description: A large freshwater predator with a long, streamlined body.
LucyAndCalart.PF_WidemouthBlindcat.descr: An incredibly rare cave-dwelling catfish with nearly invisible eyes.
LucyAndCalart.PF_RedBetta.description: An ornamental fish with a bright red body and flowing white fins.
LucyAndCalart.PF_BlueBetta.description: An ornamental fish with a deep blue body and vibrant red fins.
LucyAndCalart.PF_Snakehead.description: A long, heavy fish capable of breathing air for short periods.
LucyAndCalart.PF_PeacockBass.description: It features three bold, dark stripes across its golden torso.
LucyAndCalart.PF_BlackBuffalo.descriptio: A thick-bodied fish that vacuum up nutrients from the riverbed.
LucyAndCalart.PF_Arapaima.description: A heavy giant of the river that surfaces to gulp down air.
LucyAndCalart.PF_ButterflyKoi.descriptio: A carp with long, flowing fins that look like butterfly wings.
LucyAndCalart.PF_HillstreamLoach.descrip: A flat little fish that clings to rocks in fast-moving streams.
LucyAndCalart.PF_MolluskMeat.description: A soft piece of meat extracted from a shell.
LucyAndCalart.PF_PriedClam.description: An unopened clam. Clint might be able to extract whatever is inside.
LucyAndCalart.PF_PriedOyster.description: An unopened oyster. Clint might be able to extract whatever is inside.
LucyAndCalart.PF_PurplePearl.description: An uncommon pearl known for its deep purple hue.
LucyAndCalart.PF_SmallPurplePearl.descri: A small pearl with a bright purple shimmer.
LucyAndCalart.PF_PurpleEdisonPearl.descr: A rare, oversized pearl with a vibrant purple luster.
LucyAndCalart.PF_SilverEdisonPearl.descr: A rare, oversized pearl with a bright silver luster.
LucyAndCalart.PF_PinkEdisonPearl.descrip: A rare freshwater pearl with a soft pink luster.
LucyAndCalart.PF_PeacockTahitianPearl.de: An incredibly rare pearl with shimmering colors that shift in the light.
LucyAndCalart.PF_PinkPearl.description: An uncommon pearl with a soft pink hue.
LucyAndCalart.PF_SmallPinkPearl.descript: A small pearl with a bright pink shimmer.
LucyAndCalart.PF_RoseGoldPearl.descripti: A rare pearl known for its striking rose gold color.
LucyAndCalart.PF_SmallRoseGoldPearl.desc: A small but valuable pearl with a rose gold sheen.
LucyAndCalart.PF_BlackTahitianPearl.desc: An incredibly rare pearl, characterized by its deep black color.
LucyAndCalart.PF_PurpleRoseEdisonPearl.d: A rare pearl prized for its rich purple color.
LucyAndCalart.PF_MeloPearl.description: An incredibly rare pearl with a warm orange glow. Unlike most pearls, it isn't formed inside an oyster.
LucyAndCalart.PF_SirensSignetRing.descri: A ring made from a rare sea pearl. +2 luck.
LucyAndCalart.PF_CosmeticSirensSignetRin: A ring made from a rare sea pearl.
LucyAndCalart.PF_RoyalFang.description: A royal dagger crafted for quick and precise strikes.
LucyAndCalart.PF_SeaKingsMaul.descriptio: A massive maul with the crushing weight of the Fern Islands.
LucyAndCalart.PF_SirensSaber.description: A legendary saber crafted from gold and rare ocean pearls.
LucyAndCalart.PF_MermaidAquarium.descrip: A massive fish tank with a pearl mounted on top.
